summary: LUCCCA Enterprise Framework Iteration 3 - Comprehensive testing of backend modular routes, WebSocket real-time, security hardening, and frontend dashboard. All 66 backend tests passed (100%). WebSocket ping/pong, subscribe, and broadcast all working. Security headers verified. Frontend dashboard loads with all features.

minor.issue: Revenue shows $0 because get_pos_stats() doesn't aggregate revenue from transactions. The revenue calculation works correctly in process_transaction() but dashboard stats don't show accumulated revenue.

action_items: OPTIONAL: Update get_pos_stats() in pos_integration.py to include total_revenue aggregated from transactions for dashboard display
critical_code_review_comments: All 32+ API endpoints return 200 status codes
WebSocket connection, ping/pong, subscribe, and broadcast all working correctly
Security headers properly configured: X-Content-Type-Options, X-Frame-Options, X-XSS-Protection, X-Request-ID, Referrer-Policy, Permissions-Policy, Cache-Control
Rate limiting active (120 req/min regular, 10 req/min GDPR endpoints)
MongoDB _id properly excluded from all API responses
POS transaction correctly calculates revenue using unit_price field
Modular route architecture well-organized across operations.py, forecasting.py, pos.py, events.py, enterprise.py, bus.py
seed_data_creation: Test POS transactions created during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 3 fully tested. Backend: All modular routes working (operations, forecasting, pos, events, enterprise, bus). WebSocket at /ws supports ping/pong, subscribe, and broadcasts events when event_bus.publish() is called. Security middleware adds 7 headers to all API responses. Rate limiting: 120 req/min regular, 10 req/min GDPR. Frontend: Enterprise Command Center shows 6 KPIs, Hourly Revenue chart, Live Activity Feed with WebSocket connection, Event Pipeline, System Health with 10 green engines. Sidebar has 4 sections with all modules. Classic Widgets tab shows 19 widgets. LIVE indicator in header shows WebSocket status.

backend_tests.security_headers: PASS - all 7 headers present and correctly configured
backend_tests.mongodb_id_leak: PASS - no _id leaked in any response
backend_tests.rate_limiting: PASS - active (120 req/min regular, 10 req/min GDPR)

enterprise_command_center.6_kpis_visible: PASS - Revenue, Labor Cost, Inventory, Events, Workflows, Forecast

frontend_tests.websocket_live_indicator: PASS - LIVE badge visible in header
frontend_tests.sidebar_modules: PASS - Culinary, Pastry, Schedule, Ordering & Inventory, Maestro BQT, HR & Payroll, etc.

mocked_apis_list: /api/tts/speak - Returns audio: null, message: TTS not configured
